name: Salsa 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast green and yellow chilies under the broiler until skin swells on all sides.
2. Turn the chilies occasionally and watch carefully for scorching.
3. Cover with damp paper towels for easy peeling.
4. Peel and gently wash out seeds from yellow and green chilies under running water.
5. Peel tomatoes.
6. Chop onion and garlic.
7. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
8. Add salt and pepper as desired.
9. You may use canned crushed tomatoes instead of fresh tomatoes for a juicier salsa.
10. Add chopped cilantro as desired.
